
# Welcome {.unnumbered}

Welcome to the Arcesium Finop Python Training

Arcesum Finop Python Training is a hands-on training to learn the essentials of the Python programming language, understand the best practices and idioms of the language. It is designed for learners with no programming background. 

## The Lab Setup

A jupyterhub instance is in the cloud is setup for this training which provides a jupyter lab instance for every participant.

You can access it from <https://lab.finop-25.arcesium.vikrant.dev/>.

login credentials are shared with you through separate communication.

## Live Notes

The live trianing notes presented by the instuctor will be available live at <https://finop-25.arcesium.vikrant.dev/>.

You can use this to browse through the notes if you need to refer to a concept covered a few minutes ago, or look the codes examples covered earlier.
